arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta's admission on Ruben Amorim as Man Utd eye £50m transfer

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's wife has same Manchester United complaint as Cristiano Ronaldo

arts.ttl: Barcelona aim to END Man Utd and Arsenal transfer interest for in-demand STAR
arts.sum: If Frenkie chooses not to renew, however, then with just one year left on his contract he would be able to force Barcelona's hand into selling him this summer, where he would surely have his pick of Europe's top clubs. Frenkie de Jong's contract runs out in the summer of 2026, and Ferran Correas has reported in Sport that Barcelona have sent a new renewal offer to the Dutchman.
